note: Official expectation model only — live integration NOT executed.
authMethod: Optional api-key header (api-key: <key>) over the REST API; commonly unauthenticated on a private network.

status.error: Wrong input: Vector dimension error: expected dim: 768, got 384

commonIntegrationFailure: Dimension mismatch (collection created with a different vector size than the embedding model 768), connection refused when Qdrant is down; LocalAIFactory must degrade gracefully (Qdrant optional, REST only).
preventionRule: Create collections with the embedding model's exact dimension (768 for nomic-embed-text); REST only; treat Qdrant as optional via the cached health snapshot, never block a request path (CLAUDE.md §5).
